patents.title: Device and Method for Diagnosing Exposure Keratopathy based on Multimodal Fusion Learning (Application)
summaryHtml: Two-stage multimodal fusion learning framework for automatic grading of Exposure Keratopathy (EK). Trained with four ocular imaging modalities collected at a tertiary hospital (broadbeam, slit-beam, scattering, and blue-light): modality-wise features are aligned and fused during training, while inference enables modality-agnostic classification using only a single broadbeam image to implicitly leverage information from other modalities.
Achieved an average improvement of +16%p in F1 and accuracy compared to a single-modality baseline, reducing acquisition burden and improving clinical applicability.
